summary: The session focused on providing a comprehensive list of weightlifting exercises for a weekly workout routine, detailing the average one-rep max (1RM) weight ranges and recommended percentages for various exercises. The user requested the complete list of exercises for all days in one response after initially receiving incomplete information.
facts: The user requested a complete list of exercises for a weekly workout routine. The workout routine includes exercises for Monday (Chest and Triceps), Tuesday (Back and Biceps), Thursday (Legs and Shoulders), and Friday (Abs and Cardio). The Monday workout includes barbell bench press, incline dumbbell press, dumbbell flyes, triceps pushdowns, and triceps dips. The Tuesday workout includes pull-ups, barbell rows, seated cable rows, dumbbell curls, and hammer curls. The Thursday workout includes squats, lunges, leg press, shoulder press, and side lateral raises. The Friday workout includes sit-ups, Russian twists, and leg raises. The user emphasized the importance of adjusting workouts according to personal needs and tracking progress.
